sentences.reference: Professor: What is one reason students should join study groups?
sentences.fullSentence: Study groups promote collaborative understanding of material

sentences.reference: Lecturer: How does sleep deprivation affect cognitive performance?
sentences.fullSentence: Sleep deprivation impairs concentration and memory

sentences.reference: Student: Online classes are less effective than in-person classes.
sentences.fullSentence: Online courses offer flexible learning and self-paced schedules

sentences.reference: Professor: Why is time management important for university students?
sentences.fullSentence: Effective management helps meet deadlines and reduces stress

sentences.reference: Classmate: Traveling abroad is too expensive for students.
sentences.fullSentence: Study abroad programs make many scholarships affordable

sentences.reference: Lecturer: What effect does reading fiction have on empathy?
sentences.fullSentence: Regular reading exposes readers to different perspectives

sentences.reference: Professor: How can students improve their public speaking skills?
sentences.fullSentence: Repeated practice builds confidence and reduces anxiety

sentences.reference: Student: Part-time jobs distract students from their studies.
sentences.fullSentence: Part-time work provides valuable skills and experience

sentences.reference: Classmate: Science classes are more important than arts classes.
sentences.fullSentence: Arts foster creativity and critical thinking

sentences.reference: Professor: What is the advantage of taking notes by hand?
sentences.fullSentence: Writing by hand improves information retention
